message:
Add OneNote and Word document support to Microsoft 365 connector

New OneNote integration (connectors/microsoft365/src/onenote.rs):
- ListNotebooksInput, ListSectionsInput, ListPagesInput for notebook
  hierarchy traversal
- GetPageInput, GetPageContentInput for retrieving page content
- CreatePageInput, UpdatePageInput for creating and modifying pages
- OneNotePageContent structured response type
- Full CRUD operations wired through the connector dispatch

Word document support (connector.rs, client.rs):
- ListWordDocumentsInput: enumerate .docx files in user drive paths
- GetWordDocumentInput: retrieve document metadata (WordDocumentMetadata)
- ExtractWordTextInput: extract plain text from .docx via Open XML
  parsing (quick_xml + zip crates), with configurable max_chars
  (default 20k, limit 100k) and 8MB download guard
- CreateWordDocumentInput: create new .docx with content, using simple
  upload for <4MB or chunked upload for larger files
- UpdateWordDocumentInput: replace document content
- ExportWordDocumentInput: export to PDF/HTML via Graph API content
  endpoint, with 25MB export guard
- WORD_EXTRACT_* and WORD_EXPORT_* safety constants

Infrastructure:
- Cargo.toml: added quick-xml and zip dependencies
- manifest.toml: expanded with full OneNote + Word tool declarations,
  parameter schemas, risk levels, and idempotency classifications
- types.rs: added DriveItem type for Graph API drive item responses
- lib.rs: re-exported onenote module
- client.rs: added Graph API methods for OneNote notebooks, sections,
  pages, page content, and drive item operations
- excel.rs, planner.rs, sharepoint.rs: formatting improvements
- integration tests: expanded with OneNote and Word operation coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
